title: lepidium auriculatum
intro: Lepidium auriculatum, also known as the auriculated cress or false pepperwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. Its health benefits include alleviating symptoms of nausea, diarrhea, and stomach pain, while also supporting the immune system. Lepidium auriculatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
